config.script:
tid = None
	one = BlueRidge.Parts.Tool.getOne(self.view.params.value)
	if one:
		tid = one.get("ToolTypeId")
	if not tid:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No tool selected", "Pick a tool first.", "warning")
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-add-attr-def",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/AddAttributeDefinition",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={"toolTypeId": tid})

transforms.code:
rows = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(value.editDraft.rows) or []
	if len(rows) == 0:
		return []
	opts = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(value.attributeOptions) or []
	out = []
	for i, r in enumerate(rows):
		r = dict(r or {})
		r['rowIndex'] = i
		out.append({'row': r, 'attributeOptions': opts})
	return out

customMethods.name: load
handleSave
handleDiscard
customMethods.script:
selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.selected) or {"rows": []}
	self.view.custom.state = {"selected": selected, "editDraft": {"rows": [dict(r) for r in (selected.get("rows") or [])]}}

customMethods.name: addRow
_applyDefinitionChange
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.editDraft) or {"rows": []})
	rows = list(draft.get("rows") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(rows):
		return
	opts = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.attributeOptions) or []
	picked = None
	for o in opts:
		if o.get("value") == newDefId:
			picked = o
			break
	row = dict(rows[idx])
	row["toolAttributeDefinitionId"] = newDefId
	if picked:
		row["definitionLabel"] = picked.get("label") or ""
		dt = picked.get("dataType") or "String"
		row["dataType"] = dt
		row["value"] = "false" if dt == "Boolean" else ""
	rows[idx] = row
	draft["rows"] = rows
	selected = BlueRidge.Common.Util.extractQualifiedValues(self.view.custom.state.selected) or {"rows": []}
	self.view.custom.state = {"selected": selected, "editDraft": draft}

customMethods.name: _applyValueChange
_removeRow

messageHandlers.script:
if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyDefinitionChange(idx, payload.get("newDefId"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyValueChange(idx, payload.get("newValue"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._removeRow(idx)

self.view.refreshBinding("custom.attributeOptions")
	rowInstances = self.getChild("RowsRepeater").props.instances
	
	self.getChild("RowsRepeater").refreshBinding('props.instances')
